name: Essilor of America
message: [AI generated] Essilor of America is a subsidiary of the renowned French company, Essilor International. Based in the US, it is a leading manufacturer and wholesale distributor of optical lenses. It specializes in creating lenses for eyeglasses and sunglasses, holding a strong reputation for its progressive and high-index lenses. It focuses on promoting good vision health and developing innovative solutions for vision correction.
